item.title: Jaime French on Tara Reid’s Movies
item.description: Jaime French shares a light take on Tara Reid’s movies in this short video.

item.title: Jaime French on a Netflix Thriller Pick
item.description: Jaime French shares thoughts on a Netflix thriller and why it stands out as a least favorite pick.
